title: capture-buffer.note_added
description: T20:capture-buffer note_added event (WS-321 Phase B). Emitted by /session-end when adoption_phase=M0 and a new file appears under notes/. Read once by /intend ignition then archived in place.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the note file

first_line.description: First non-empty line of the note (for proposal preview, capped at 200 chars)

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex (64 chars) or empty string
